case_title: LOURDES SAINEZ VS. SHELI FLESHMAN et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLESHMAN, SHELI

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lourdes Sainez.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sheli Fleshman.
09:15 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Johanna Saine, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Rental Agreement ---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 8-29-04---------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at 3848 Sacramento St., #5, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $6,720.00
Attorney's fees $1,000.00
Costs $218.30, for a total of $7,938.30
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
